title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at RINL

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at RINL
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, RINL in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About RINL:
RINL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RINL!
